title: Real Estate Law – Secure Transactions
description: Comprehensive legal services for real estate transactions: purchase and sale, lease, developer agreements, title due diligence, property disputes. Specter & Associates Law Firm, Warsaw.
content:
Real Estate Transactions – Why You Need a Lawyer

Buying or selling property is one of the most significant financial decisions in a person's life. A legal mistake in a property transaction can lead to the loss of the property, years of litigation or serious financial loss. Specter & Associates Law Firm in Warsaw provides comprehensive legal services for all types of real estate transactions – for buyers, sellers, investors and developers alike.

Real Estate Title Due Diligence

Before signing a purchase agreement, a thorough investigation of the property's legal status is essential. Our lawyers carry out a detailed property audit that includes:

  • Land register review – verification of the registered owner, mortgages, easements, warnings and third-party claims,
  • Land and planning status – checking the local zoning plan, building conditions and administrative decisions affecting the property,
  • Outstanding liabilities – checking for arrears in rent, taxes and cooperative charges,
  • Pending claims and litigation – confirming whether the property is subject to any ongoing court or enforcement proceedings.

Real Estate Contracts

We draft and review all types of real estate contracts:

  • Preliminary agreements – securing the transaction during the negotiation phase, protecting the deposit or advance payment,
  • Sale and purchase agreements – preparing the notarial deed, negotiating transaction terms, attending the signing ceremony,
  • Lease and tenancy agreements – commercial and residential leases, short-term tenancy agreements, agricultural land leases,
  • Establishment of easements – rights of way, transmission easements, personal easements.

Developer Agreements

Purchasing a flat from a developer involves a number of legal risks. We assist prospective buyers in:

  • reviewing the developer's information prospectus,
  • assessing the terms of the developer agreement for compliance with the Developer Act,
  • negotiating more favourable contractual terms,
  • pursuing claims where the developer is late in delivering the property or the flat has defects.

We ensure your funds are protected – we check the escrow account and bank guarantees offered by the developer.

Real Estate Disputes

Property disputes are among the most complex civil cases. We represent clients in proceedings involving:

  • protection of ownership and possession,
  • adverse possession (acquisitive prescription),
  • division of matrimonial property that includes real estate,
  • termination of co-ownership,
  • neighbour disputes (nuisance, boundary disputes, rights of way),
  • compensation claims related to real estate.

We welcome property owners, investors and developers to use our services. Contact Specter & Associates to discuss your matter.
